description: Test-only rewrite of the cli-copilot section of cli-matrix.vitest.ts so the assertions model buildCopilotPromptArg's built.argv + promptFileBody shape (the contract packet 026/011/012 actually ships) instead of the legacy resolveCopilotPromptArg / -p "$(cat ...)" command-string form. Closes F-004 P2 from the 011 deep-review and satisfies the §7 Packet B PASS gate. Production code (executor-config.ts + both _auto.yaml files) is byte-stable.
